title: Managed Agents in the Gemini API
summary: Google introduced Managed Agents in the Gemini API, enabling single API calls to deploy autonomous agents running in remote Linux sandboxes powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash. The system uses the Interactions API, features agent-native documentation and skills, and supports integration with text-to-speech tools like Lyria and Google Nano Banana for real-world applications.
